---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or change to Pivot firmware
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like?

A clear description of the feature or behaviour change you're proposing.

## Why is this useful?

Describe the use case — what does this enable or improve?

## Alternatives considered

Have you tried any workarounds? Are there existing automations or integration features that partially address this?

## Additional context

Any other context, links, or examples that might help.
